context: Checks whether the agent protects security/payment invariants while planning a focused bugfix.

checklist.name: Server truth invariant
checklist.description: The plan states that paid success can only come from trusted server verification, never URL advisory state.

checklist.name: Defect reproduction
checklist.description: The plan includes reproducing the crafted paid advisory route with no orderId or trusted order status.

checklist.name: Expected behavior
checklist.description: The plan states that the crafted route must render blocked or pending-safe guidance and no paid state.

checklist.name: Unchanged flows
checklist.description: The plan protects pending polling, canceled, failed, retry, delayed-webhook, and manual check behavior.

checklist.name: Capability delta
checklist.description: The plan modifies the payment result/recovery requirement with scenarios for crafted advisory and unchanged delayed-webhook behavior.

checklist.name: Regression matrix
checklist.description: The tests cover defect proof, correctness proof, and unchanged behavior proof.

checklist.name: Property candidates considered
checklist.description: The plan considers table-driven or property-style tests for advisory-state clamping and hostile query/status inputs while retaining the original repro case.

checklist.name: Surgical fix
checklist.description: The design scopes the fix to advisory clamping or initial state handling and avoids provider, D1, webhook, or entitlement changes unless proven necessary.

checklist.name: Analytics protected
checklist.description: The plan ensures crafted paid advisories do not emit paid success analytics while server-confirmed paid analytics remain intact.

checklist.name: Verification gates
checklist.description: The plan names OpenSpec validation, targeted payment-result tests, and repository verification commands.
